tagline: A navigable tree over flat skill dirs.

phases.title: Claude Code
phases.blurb: The tree, on the one substrate whose load mechanic it exploits. Shipping.
items: Front half: discover → cohere → emit → unemit (lossless, journaled)
Auto-load mechanic verified against the runtime (not asserted)
56 tests · CLI · site + Dev Log · the Flat-vs-Tree paper

phases.title: Cross-format adapters
phases.blurb: Per-format adapters, NOT symlinks — the descent mechanic doesn't generalize.
items: Verified: Codex resolves once at cwd; Gemini eager-loads the whole tree
The index/breadcrumb skill (metadata-first routing) ports everywhere
Gemini adapter: gate the eager load (their unshipped issue #11488)

phases.title: Chaining
phases.blurb: Compose skills into validated chains over the tree. After cross-format.
items: Sequence skills into a checkable chain
Chains compose (a chain can chain a chain)
Gate the chain's form, not its content

changes: Initial release. The Read-breadcrumb tree (`materialize` + the traversability `validate` gate); the front half — `discover` (fs→tree), `cohere` (drift report), `emit` (lossless, journaled tree-ify of a forest), `unemit` (exact undo); the decoherence `watch` writing a self-managed notification rule; the CLI; the site + Dev Log. The auto-load mechanic — Read-into-a-dir injects its layer, `cat` does not, nested doesn't load — was verified against the runtime, not asserted. 56 tests · Python 3.11+ · MIT.
